Parth Parmar
About Resume Blog

Hi, I'm Parth Parmar.

I’m a software engineer focused on building infrastructure for large-scale AI systems. My work sits at the intersection of distributed systems and machine learning infrastructure, where the goal is not only to build powerful models but to make them reliable, scalable, and usable in real-world products.

At Amazon Ads, I’ve worked on systems supporting LLM-powered products, including agent infrastructure, synthetic data generation pipelines for post-training, and evaluation platforms that help measure and improve model performance at scale.

I’m particularly interested in the engineering challenges that arise when machine learning systems move from research to production. Many of the hardest problems in AI today are not just about better models, but about building the surrounding infrastructure — data pipelines, evaluation systems, and distributed platforms that allow these models to operate reliably. This website is a place where I share technical writing, experiments, and notes on topics like ML infrastructure, LLM systems, and scalable AI platforms.

Currently Exploring..

  • Model serving and inference systems
  • Data pipelines and orchestration
  • Platform reliability and observability
